454	func TestRefactorBaseline_FixturesStable(t *testing.T) {
455		dir := filepath.Join("testdata", "refactor_baseline")
456		update := os.Getenv("UPDATE_BASELINE") == "1"
457	
458		names := make([]string, 0, len(refactorBaselineScenarios))
459		for name := range refactorBaselineScenarios {
460			names = append(names, name)
461		}
462		sort.Strings(names)
463	
464		for _, name := range names {
465			events := refactorBaselineScenarios[name]
466			t.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {
467				var canonical bytes.Buffer
468				gotKinds := make([]string, 0, len(events))
469				for _, ev := range events {
470					if k, _ := ev["kind"].(string); k != "" {
471						gotKinds = append(gotKinds, k)
472					}
473					line, err := json.Marshal(ev)
474					if err != nil {
475						t.Fatalf("marshal: %v", err)
476					}
477					canonical.Write(line)
478					canonical.WriteByte('\n')
479				}
480	
481				want, ok := refactorBaselineExpectedKinds[name]
482				if !ok {
483					t.Fatalf("scenario %q missing expected-kinds entry", name)
484				}
485				if !equalStringSlices(gotKinds, want) {
486					t.Fatalf("scenario %q: kinds=%v want=%v", name, gotKinds, want)
487				}
488	
489				path := filepath.Join(dir, name)
490				if update {
491					if err := os.WriteFile(path, canonical.Bytes(), 0o644); err != nil {
492						t.Fatalf("write: %v", err)
493					}
494					return
495				}
496	
497				got, err := os.ReadFile(path)
498				if err != nil {
499					t.Fatalf("read fixture %s: %v (run UPDATE_BASELINE=1 to regenerate)", path, err)
500				}
501				if !bytes.Equal(got, canonical.Bytes()) {
502					t.Fatalf("fixture %s drifted from canonical baseline; run UPDATE_BASELINE=1 to regenerate after intentional event-shape changes", path)
503				}
504			})
505		}
506	
507		t.Run("no_orphan_fixtures", func(t *testing.T) {
508			entries, err := os.ReadDir(dir)
509			if err != nil {
510				t.Fatalf("read dir: %v", err)
511			}
512			for _, e := range entries {
513				if e.IsDir() || filepath.Ext(e.Name()) != ".jsonl" {
514					continue
515				}
516				if _, ok := refactorBaselineScenarios[e.Name()]; !ok {
517					t.Errorf("orphan baseline fixture %s has no scenario in refactorBaselineScenarios", e.Name())
518				}
519			}
520		})
521	}
522	
523	func equalStringSlices(a, b []string) bool {
524		if len(a) != len(b) {
525			return false
526		}
527		for i := range a {
528			if a[i] != b[i] {
529				return false
530			}
531		}
532		return true
533	}
